criteria.name: Vendor Location and Registration
checklist_signals: Local partner or registered in Pakistan

criteria.name: Team Composition
checklist_signals: No nationals, permanent residents, or people originating from India and/or Israel
Certificate for overseas nationals to travel to Pakistan

criteria.name: Financial History
checklist_signals: Audited accounts and tax returns for a minimum of two financial years

criteria.name: Blacklisting Status
checklist_signals: Not blacklisted within Pakistan or any other jurisdiction

criteria.name: Previous Experience
checklist_signals: Description of previous experience of similar and relevant assignments

criteria.name: Understanding of Project Scope
checklist_signals: Understanding of the project's scope of work
evidence_required: Document showing understanding of project scope

criteria.name: Proposed Methodology
checklist_signals: Proposed methodology in line with the scope

criteria.name: Work Plan and Team
checklist_signals: Detailed work plan with deliverables and timelines
Project team with experts and their roles

criteria.name: Desk Review of Proposal
checklist_signals: Understanding of the project’s scope of work
Proposed methodology and approach for policy development
Past Experience of the firm or the consortium

criteria.name: Financial Proposal
evidence_required: Budget in PKR inclusive of all taxes

poison_pill_clauses.clause_text: Failure to disclose conflict of interest may lead to disqualification or contract termination
poison_pill_clauses.trigger_condition: Failure to disclose conflict of interest

poison_pill_clauses.clause_text: Failure to disclose related party information may lead to disqualification or contract termination
poison_pill_clauses.trigger_condition: Failure to disclose related party information

poison_pill_clauses.clause_text: Karandaaz Pakistan shall not award the contract if it is determined that the bidder, or any of its personnel, or its agents, or its suppliers and/or their employees, has, directly or indirectly, engaged in corrupt, fraudulent, collusive, coercive, or obstructive practices in competing for the contract in question.
poison_pill_clauses.trigger_condition: Engagement in corrupt, fraudulent, collusive, coercive, or obstructive practices

poison_pill_clauses.clause_text: Any bidder participating in the procurement process should disclose any actual or perceived conflict of interest situation/condition. Any bidder to have a conflict of interest shall be ineligible for award of a contract.
Any bidder to have a conflict of interest shall be ineligible for award of a contract.
The bidder will not use funds provided under this Agreement, directly or indirectly, in support of activities (a) prohibited by US laws related to combatting terrorism

poison_pill_clauses.trigger_condition: Yes answer to any of the questions #1-7

submission_rules: Proposals must be submitted in English
Proposals must be submitted in hard copy and electronically
Proposal must be signed and stamped by an authorized person
The bidder shall prepare and email a scanned copy of the documents comprising the proposal as specified in Clause 10, of Section 2 on its official letterhead.
Each document shall be signed by a person duly authorized to sign on behalf of the bidder and all pages of the proposal shall be initialled by the person or persons signing the proposal.
